title: User ID not being saved in comments
symptom: When submitting a comment, the user_id field in the comment table is empty, showing as 0 instead of the actual user ID.
applies_when: Submitting comments to a Xano backend
not_this_if: User ID is correctly populated in other workflows
Using Xano Auth instead of WeWeb Auth
root_cause: The issue arises because the workflow is sending the entire user object instead of just the user ID to Xano. This results in the user_id field being set to 0, as the backend does not know how to handle the full object.
fix_steps: Open the workflow in WeWeb that handles comment submissions
Locate the binding for the user_id field
Change the binding from 'WeWeb Auth - [user]' to 'WeWeb Auth - [user].id'
Save the workflow and test submitting a comment again
agent_instruction: Update the user_id binding in the comment submission workflow to send only the user ID.
